name: vukkt-plugins
description: Plugins by Vuk Topalovic — currently token-warden, a measurement and selection layer that makes Claude Code subagents measurably cheaper over time.

plugins.name: token-warden
plugins.description: Makes Claude Code subagents measurably cheaper over time: records token cost per session, distills candidate efficiency rules from expensive runs, benchmarks them on a frozen golden suite, and keeps only rules that save at least 2x their context rent. Also: per-tool/skill/MCP cost attribution, per-rule verdict receipts, model and prompt A/B benchmarking, cost-anomaly alerts, and team-shareable rule ledgers. 93% test coverage behind a CI-ratcheted floor.
